backups	CREATE TABLE `backups` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `nome` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `tamanho` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `fileUrl` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `fileKey` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` enum('gerando','concluido','erro') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL DEFAULT 'gerando',
  `tabelas` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `totalRegistros` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `geradoPor` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `downloadedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `downloadedBy` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
